== Notes for [[Item:Q106346|Q106346]] ==

* From Hudood-e-Kiraam of '''3rd Shia Ismai'li Imaam''', [http://www.geni.com/people/Ali-ibn-al-Husayn-Zayn-al-Abidin/5102404071680114676/ Imaam Ali-e-Zainul Abideen bin Maulana Ali]
* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000025273042558

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
